note: The cookbook render (§Media graduate #4 · 2026-07-09): rows arrive inline or as { path: <json file> } · semantics type the fields (timestamp/usd/category) · the closed chart vocabulary (bar | line | area_band | scatter | heatmap) · `out:` must end in .svg (the attestation surface · sha256 rides the trace chain) · `compile_to: vega_lite` adds the .vl.json sibling. Engine-owned laws beyond the schema: deterministic byte-identical SVG · Count ticks stay integer.
